## Summary

- What changed in this PR?
- Why is this change needed?

## Related Issue

- Closes #<issue-id> (if any)

## Testing

- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test`
- [ ] Android manual test completed
- [ ] Windows manual test completed (optional currently)
- [ ] iOS manual test completed (optional currently)

1.
2.

Platform coverage note (required):

- Confirm whether this PR was verified only on Android.

## Risk / Compatibility

- Does this change affect import parsing, storage schema, notification, or widget sync?
- Any rollback plan needed?

## Attribution / License Check

- [ ] No third-party code involved
- [ ] Third-party code involved and `docs/UPSTREAM_ATTRIBUTION.md` has been updated

## Checklist

- [ ] I have synced with latest `develop` (and `main` if needed)
- [ ] I have added or updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] I did not include secrets (cookie/token/password)
